messages.content:
Summarize the CVE in professional cybersecurity language.

An improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability [CWE-78] in FortiSOAR IMAP connector version 3.5.7 and below may allow an authenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via a specifically crafted playbook

The FortiSOAR IMAP connector version 3.5.7 and earlier is susceptible to an OS Command Injection vulnerability due to improper neutralization of special elements, potentially allowing authenticated users to execute unauthorized commands through a crafted playbook.
